title: The Adventure Begins
logline: Lost at sea in a storm, a young bear named Keen dives without hesitation to save a tangled dolphin — and his courage earns him a place, a family, and his Aquamarine crystal in Crystal Cove.
engine: Courage emerging through selfless action — Keen's origin

title: Howey's Lopsided Day
logline: Crystal Cove's kindest bear keeps saying yes until he collapses under everyone's favours — and learns from Amie that you can't pour from an empty pot, and that he is enough even when he isn't helping.
